_comment: ElevenLabs-compatible TTS Proxy configuration. Environment variables override these values.

llm._comment: Set to null to use miotts_server defaults. Env var overrides: PROXY_LLM_TEMPERATURE, PROXY_LLM_TOP_P, PROXY_LLM_MAX_TOKENS, PROXY_LLM_REPETITION_PENALTY, PROXY_LLM_PRESENCE_PENALTY, PROXY_LLM_FREQUENCY_PENALTY
